segments.text: when you are procrastinating when you pushing a task away what you're actually operating from is a feeling of fear a
fear of Step 10 you're overthinking about step 10 you're thinking about step 10 and getting intimidated into inaction
now what I want you to do whenever you are afraid of whatever the results might look like at step 10 is I want you to zoom in I want you to think about the
next step that you can take
